summary: Iteration 2 re-test of Vitruvian Construct admin edit/upload/settings + cozy-chaos re-seed. Backend: all 27 pytest cases pass (site payload + cozy axolotl re-seed validation, projects/art/updates CRUD with PUT update + GET-verify, featured-exclusivity, settings GET/PUT with reflection in /api/site, file upload happy path + auth + bad-extension rejection + public fetch of uploaded file via /api/uploads/<file>). Frontend: home shows cozy-chaos copy (status 'COZY CHAOS // IN DEVELOPMENT', Kiddo, Lottie, Cozy Chaos, Slice of Life), /admin login with 'vitruvian-admin-2025' unlocks Workshop Console with all 5 tabs (projects, art, transmissions, settings, subscribers), Projects inline edit+save updates the list, Concept art '+ Add plate' opens form, art edit+save persists caption, Settings tagline edit+save reflects live on home page, then was reset to 'Enter the Construct.' as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: Tab data-testid for transmissions is 'admin-tab-transmissions' (Admin.jsx line 820), not 'admin-tab-updates' as the review request loosely implied. Existing testid matches the tab label and was verified end-to-end. Worth noting for future test scripts.

POST /api/admin/upload mounts files at /api/uploads via FastAPI StaticFiles. Confirmed publicly fetchable through the Kubernetes ingress (no auth on GET, matches the design). No file-size limit set — consider adding one to prevent abuse if admin endpoint ever leaks.

PUT /api/admin/settings expects the full SiteSettings shape (tagline/hero_subtitle/social) — it overwrites the document. Acceptable for a singleton settings doc; just be aware partial updates would null fields.
PUT /api/admin/projects with featured=true correctly unfeatures all others atomically (verified by integration test). Good.
DEFAULT_ART has 5 entries (re-seed wiped + reinserted under SEED_VERSION=3). Earlier iteration_1 expected 6; backend_test.py updated to assert exactly 5 as per the new requirement.
All public endpoints continue to strip Mongo _id via projection or pop. No ObjectId leakage observed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (home cozy-chaos copy, admin login, all 5 tabs, project edit/save, art edit/save + add-plate toggle, settings tagline live reflection, transmissions & subscribers tabs load)

seed_data_creation: Re-seed handled by backend on startup (SEED_VERSION=3): featured project 'Irresponsible Axolotl' with COZY CHAOS status, 5 concept-art entries, 3 transmissions. Tests created/cleaned up TEST_-prefixed projects/art/updates. Tagline was temporarily set to TEST_TAGLINE_LIVE during frontend testing and reset to 'Enter the Construct.' via the API at the end (verified via /api/site).
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py covers 27 critical paths including new PUT endpoints, settings GET/PUT with site-payload reflection, featured-exclusivity, upload happy/auth/bad-ext paths, and public /api/uploads fetch. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend selectors verified: admin-tab-{projects|art|transmissions|settings|subscribers}, project-edit-{slug}, edit-project-{title|description|save}, art-edit-{id}, edit-art-{caption|save}, admin-new-art-toggle, settings-tagline, settings-save, subscribers-export. Note: admin auth is persisted in browser storage so re-navigating to /admin in the same session skips the login form.
